---
title: "Margaret Roper"
---

## Margaret Roper

**Dates:** (1505-1544)

**Maiden name:** (More)

### Description

daughter of Sir Thomas More

### Biography

She was the subject of a biography by \'F. C. D.\' , said by CMY to be a descendant, in the second series of <i>Biographies of Good Women</i> (1865).

### Letters

- Letter from June 29th 1863 

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
